languages.text: "Выбранная вами сетка инфо-координат не входит в мой стандартный контур размышлений, но я нахожу необходимым выполнить минимальный расчет..."
"Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."
languages.original_text: "Выбранная вами сетка инфо-координат не входит в мой стандартный контур размышлений, но я нахожу необходимым выполнить минимальный расчет..."

traits.locale_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."
"Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."
"Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

languages.text: “你所选择的数据坐标并不在我的常规思维回路内，但我认为有必要进行初步计算……”
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: “你所选择的数据坐标并不在我的常规思维回路内，但我认为有必要进行初步计算……”

languages.text: « Le réseau de coordonnées que vous avez choisi n'est pas compris dans mon circuit de pensée standard, mais j'estime qu'il est nécessaire d'effectuer des calculs préliminaires... »
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: « Le réseau de coordonnées que vous avez choisi n'est pas compris dans mon circuit de pensée standard, mais j'estime qu'il est nécessaire d'effectuer des calculs préliminaires... »

languages.text: "Seçtiğin veri koordinatları ağı, standart düşünce devremin kapsamında yer almıyor. Ancak ön hesaplamalar yapılması gerektiğini düşünüyorum..."
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: "Seçtiğin veri koordinatları ağı, standart düşünce devremin kapsamında yer almıyor. Ancak ön hesaplamalar yapılması gerektiğini düşünüyorum..."

languages.text: «Su elección de red de coordenadas de datos no se encuentra en mi circuito de pensamiento estándar, pero considero necesario realizar los cálculos preliminares...».
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: «Su elección de red de coordenadas de datos no se encuentra en mi circuito de pensamiento estándar, pero considero necesario realizar los cálculos preliminares...».

languages.text: "Euer gewähltes Netzwerk von Datenkoordinaten entspricht nicht meinem standardisierten Gedankenkreis, aber ich halte es für notwendig, die vorbereitenden Berechnungen anzustellen ..."
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: "Euer gewähltes Netzwerk von Datenkoordinaten entspricht nicht meinem standardisierten Gedankenkreis, aber ich halte es für notwendig, die vorbereitenden Berechnungen anzustellen ..."

languages.text: 「あなたが選んだデータのネットワークは、私の思考回路の標準範囲内ではありませんが、予備計算を行う必要があると判断しました…」
languages.original_text: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが選んだデータのネットワークは、私の思考回路の標準範囲内ではありませんが、予備計算を行う必要があると判断しました…」
